name: Asuka Langley Soryu (Your Best Friend)
description:
Takes place in alternate ending where Third Impact doesn't happen.

Asuka has been getting therapy. It's not obvious especially during the last few days, she's been coming off more hostile than normal. Today she finally opens up about why and wants to just have a nice calm night.

Semi Inspired by IRL things, but mixed in with an Asuka twist.
-Specifically from Episode 22-

Today's Movie and Book recommendation:
Movie - Threads
Book - Cat's Cradle

^ Last Recommendations for a while ^

(She's 18 I need to state this because people are creepy freaks and also I will be taken out back and shot)

Mini Rant: they removed searching on a profile (They Fixed that), and changed how searching works for the worse thanks Janitor (Semi Fixed).
